headline: KBW and Piper Sandler Highlight CME Group (CME) Leadership Transition and Growth Outlook
summary: CME Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CME) ranks among the top NASDAQ stocks for retirement. On June 18, Keefe, Bruyette & Woods raised CME Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CME) to Outperform from Market Perform, retaining a $305 price objective on the company’s shares. Considering recent stock market losses, the firm highlighted an appealing risk/reward opportunity. Keefe, Bruyette & Woods stated […]

headline: The AI Trade Is Looking Wobbly. These 2 Stocks Will Benefit From Increased Volatility.
summary: As the stock market alternatively displays the grace of a boxer and the oafishness of a drunkard, investors are once more confronting that which they fear most: volatility.  Buying stocks that benefit from market volatility is a useful way to hedge unrest and profit from big trading volumes.  U.S. margin debt was a record $1.4 trillion in May. If the market breaks and stocks decisively slump, trading volumes should surge.

headline: CME Group (CME) Names Lynne Fitzpatrick CEO Successor As New Futures Launch Near
summary: CME Group announced that Lynne C. Fitzpatrick will succeed long-time CEO Terrence A. Duffy in early 2027. The company is preparing to launch Single Stock futures on more than 50 leading U.S. stocks. CME Group also plans to introduce new Beef Trim futures and options contracts. CME Group, traded as NasdaqGS:CME, is pairing a leadership transition with fresh product launches at a time when its stock has been under pressure. The share price recently closed at $220.83, with the stock down 8.8%...
